What to expect

  • Reply within 24 hours

    Usually much faster during business hours (China GMT+8).

  • Supplier shortlist in 48h

    3–5 vetted options with pricing and profiles.

  • No commitment required

    Review our options before deciding anything.

  • Dedicated agent assigned

    One person manages your entire inquiry start to finish.

"CrossPals replied within 2 hours and had 4 suppliers for me by the next morning."
— Lagos, Nigeria · First-time importer
